install.other_releases: Other variants (Intel Mac, ARM Linux, AppImage): https://github.com/edison7009/Coffee-CLI/releases/latest
install.note: Coffee CLI ships as a Tauri desktop app. The one-line `iwr | iex` (Windows) or `curl | sh` (macOS / Linux) script handles download, install, and PATH setup automatically — prefer it over the manual download links.

install_flow.summary: Run the one-line install script for the user's OS — it does everything.
agent_steps: Windows: run `iwr -useb https://coffeecli.com/install.ps1 | iex` via `shell_exec` — the script downloads to %LOCALAPPDATA%\Coffee CLI and registers a shortcut.
macOS / Linux: run `curl -fsSL https://coffeecli.com/install.sh | sh` — the script downloads and places the binary on PATH.
If the install script fails (network, region block), fall back to the direct download URLs above and tell the user to double-click the installer.
After install, tell the user where Coffee CLI is installed (Windows: `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Coffee CLI\coffee-cli.exe`; macOS: `/Applications/Coffee CLI.app`; Linux: depends on the .deb).
tell_user: How to launch (Start menu / Applications / `coffee` CLI)
